posts.author: TheCreative (Awe Ebenezer)
posts.cookedHtml:
I will like to get some hands on challenge to prepare me for this skill. I am 60% into the monday course.

Natively, I am a Framer/WebFLow Website Designer and looking forward to adding Project Management to my skill. here is why I am here.

I will really appreciate your help. Thanks.
